title: cylindropuntia imbricata subsp. spinotecta
intro: Cylindropuntia imbricata subsp. spinotecta, also known as the tree cholla, is a type of cactus plant that belongs to the Opuntia genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cylindropuntia imbricata subsp. spinotecta include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into ointments, salves, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including skin irritations and minor cuts.
